conjecture_statement: Let $V$ be a set with $|V|=6$ and let $E = \binom{V}{2}$ be the set of 2-element subsets of $V$. For any 2-coloring $c: E \to \{0, 1\}$, let $T_m(c) = \{ \{u,v,w\} \in \binom{V}{3} \mid c(\{u,v\}) = c(\{v,w\}) = c(\{w,u\}) \}$ be the set of monochromatic triangles. Then, $|T_m(c)| \ge 2$.
lean4_sketch:
import Mathlib.Data.Fintype.Card
import Mathlib.Data.Finset.Sym
import Mathlib.Data.Nat.Choose.Sum
import Mathlib.Tactic.Linarith

theorem schur_6 (V : Type*) [Fintype V] (hV : Fintype.card V = 6)
  (c : Sym2 V → Fin 2) :
  2 ≤ (Finset.univ.filter (fun T : Finset V ↦ T.card = 3 ∧
    (∃ k : Fin 2, ∀ e ∈ T.sym2, c e = k))).card := by

  -- ===== Definitions =====
  let n : ℕ := 6
  have hn_card : Fintype.card V = n := hV

  let all_triangles := (Finset.univ : Finset (Finset V)).filter (fun T ↦ T.card = 3)
  let mono_triangles := all_triangles.filter (fun T ↦ ∃ k : Fin 2, ∀ e ∈ T.sym2, c e = k)
  let non_mono_triangles := all_triangles.filter (fun T ↦ ¬(∃ k : Fin 2, ∀ e ∈ T.sym2, c e = k))

  let num_mono_triangles := mono_triangles.card
  let num_non_mono_triangles := non_mono_triangles.card
  let total_triangles := all_triangles.card

  -- The total number of V-formations with same-colored edges ("monochromatic cherries")
  let num_mono_cherries := (Finset.univ : Finset V).sum (fun v ↦
    let deg k := (Finset.univ.filter (fun u ↦ u ≠ v ∧ c ⟦(v, u)⟧ = k)).card
    Nat.choose (deg 0) 2 + Nat.choose (deg 1) 2)

  have h_total_triangles_val : total_triangles = 20 := by
    rw [show all_triangles.card = (Finset.univ.filter (·.card = 3)).card from rfl,
        Finset.card_filter_univ, Fintype.card_finset_card, hn_card]
    norm_num

  have h_triangle_partition : num_mono_triangles + num_non_mono_triangles = total_triangles := by
    rw [← Finset.card_union_of_disjoint, Finset.filter_union_filter_neg_eq]
    · rfl
    · simp [Finset.disjoint_iff, mono_triangles, non_mono_triangles]
      intro t h1 h2 heq; exact h2.2 h2.1 h1.2

  -- ===== Sub-Lemmas from Pre-Decomposition Plan =====

  -- Sub-Lemma 1: Count monochromatic cherries via relation to triangles
  have schur_6_sub1 : num_mono_cherries = 3 * num_mono_triangles + num_non_mono_triangles := by
    -- This identity arises from double counting. We sum, over all triangles,
    -- the number of monochromatic cherries ea
lean4_sketch_archimedes:
import Mathlib.Data.Fintype.Card
import Mathlib.Data.Finset.Basic
import Mathlib.Data.Nat.Choose.Sum
import Mathlib.Tactic.Linarith
import Mathlib.Combinatorics.SimpleGraph.Basic
import Mathlib.Combinatorics.Pigeonhole

open Finset

theorem schur_6 (V : Type*) [Fintype V] (hV : Fintype.card V = 6)
  (c : Sym2 V → Fin 2) :
  2 ≤ (Finset.univ.filter (fun T : Finset V ↦ T.card = 3 ∧
    (∃ k : Fin 2, ∀ e ∈ (Sym2.fromFinset T).toFinset, c e = k))).card := by

  -- ===== Definitions =====
  let n : ℕ := 6
  have hn_card : Fintype.card V = n := hV

  let all_triangles := (Finset.univ : Finset (Finset V)).filter (fun T ↦ T.card = 3)
  let mono_triangles := all_triangles.filter (fun T ↦ ∃ k : Fin 2, ∀ e ∈ (Sym2.fromFinset T).toFinset, c e = k)
  let non_mono_triangles := all_triangles.filter (fun T ↦ ¬(∃ k : Fin 2, ∀ e ∈ (Sym2.fromFinset T).toFinset, c e = k))

  let num_mono_triangles := mono_triangles.card
  let num_non_mono_triangles := non_mono_triangles.card
  let total_triangles := all_triangles.card

  -- The total number of V-formations with same-colored edges ("monochromatic cherries")
  let num_mono_cherries := (Finset.univ : Finset V).sum (fun v ↦
    let deg (k : Fin 2) := ((Finset.univ : Finset V).filter (fun u ↦ u ≠ v ∧ c (Sym2.mk (v, u)) = k)).card
    Nat.choose (deg 0) 2 + Nat.choose (deg 1) 2)

  have h_total_triangles_val : total_triangles = 20 := by
    rw [all_triangles.card, Finset.card_filter_univ, Fintype.card_finset_card_eq_choose, hn_card]
    norm_num

  have h_triangle_partition : num_mono_triangles + num_non_mono_triangles = total_triangles := by
    rw [← Finset.card_union_of_disjoint, Finset.filter_union_filter_neg_eq]
    · rfl
    · simp [Finset.disjoint_iff, mono_triangles, non_mono_triangles]
      intro t h1 h2 heq; exact h2.2 h2.1 h1.2

  -- ===== Sub-Lemmas from Pre-Decomposition Plan =====

  -- Sub-Lemma 1: Count monochromatic cherries via relation to triangles
  have schur_6_sub1 : num_mono_cherries = 3 * num_mono_triangles + num_non_mono_triangles := by
    let cherries_in_triangle (T : Finset V) (hT : T.card = 3) :=
      (T : Finset V).sum (fun v ↦
        let deg (k : Fin 2) := ((T : Finset V).filter (fun u ↦ u ≠ v ∧ c (Sym2.mk (v, u)) = k)).card
        Nat.choose (deg 0) 2 + Nat.choose (deg 1) 2)

    have h_cherries_mono : ∀ T ∈ mono_triangles, cherries_in_triangle T (by simp [all_triangles] at T ⊢; exact T.2) = 3 := by
      intro T hT
      simp [mono_triangles, cherries_in_triangle] at hT ⊢
      obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := hT.2
      have : ∀ v ∈ T, ∃! u ∈ T, u ≠ v ∧ c (Sym2.mk (v, u)) = k := by
        intro v hv
        use T.filter (· ≠ v)
        simp [Finset.card_eq_two.1 (by rw [Finset.card_erase_of_mem hv, T.2]; norm_num)]
        intro u hu
        exact ⟨hu.1, hu.2, by simp [Sym2.mk, hk (Sym2.fromFinset_pair hv hu.1)]⟩
      simp [this, Nat.choose, if_pos rfl]

    have h_cherries_non_mono : ∀ T ∈ non_mono_triangles, cherries_in_triangle T (by simp [all_triangles] at T ⊢; exact T.2) = 1 := by
      intro T hT
      simp [non_mono_triangles, cherries_in_triangle] at hT ⊢
      have : ∃ v ∈ T, ∃ u w ∈ T, u ≠ v ∧ w ≠ v ∧ u ≠ w ∧ c (Sym2.mk (v, u)) ≠ c (Sym2.mk (v, w)) := by
        by_contra h
        push_neg at h
        obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := Finset.exists_ne_of_not_forall_mem_non_mono h
        exact hT ⟨k, hk⟩
      obtain ⟨v, hv, u, w, hu, hw, hne, hc⟩ := this
      have : ∀ x ∈ T, x = v ∨ x = u ∨ x = w := by
        intro x hx
        simp at hx
        tauto
      simp [this, hv, hu, hw, hne, hc, Nat.choose, if_pos rfl, if_neg hc]

    calc num_mono_cherries = (all_triangles.sum (fun T ↦ cherries_in_triangle T (by simp [all_triangles] at T ⊢; exact T.2))) := by
          simp [num_mono_cherries, cherries_in_triangle, deg]
          rw [Finset.sum_comm]
          apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
          intro v hv
          rw [Finset.sum_filter]
          apply Finset.sum_bij (fun T hT ↦ T)
          · intro T hT
            simp [all_triangles] at hT
            exact hT.1
          · intro T hT
            simp
          · intro T hT
            simp [all_triangles] at hT
            exact hT.1
          · intro T1 T2 hT1 hT2 h
            simp at h
            exact h
          · intro T hT
            use T.filter (· ≠ v)
            simp [all_triangles] at hT
            simp [hT.1, Finset.card_erase_of_mem hv]
            intro u hu
            simp [hu]
    _ = mono_triangles.sum (fun T ↦ cherries_in_triangle T (by simp [mono_triangles] at T ⊢; exact T.2))
        + non_mono_triangles.sum (fun T ↦ cherries_in_triangle T (by simp [non_mono_triangles] at T ⊢; exact T.2)) := by
          rw [Finset.sum_filter_add_sum_filter_neg_eq_sum]
          congr
    _ = 3 * num_mono_triangles + num_non_mono_triangles := by
          rw [h_cherries_mono, h_cherries_non_mono, Finset.sum_const, Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_mul, Finset.card_mul]

  -- Sub-Lemma 2: Lower bound on monochromatic cherries
  have schur_6_sub2 : 20 ≤ num_mono_cherries := by
    rw [num_mono_cherries]
    apply Finset.sum_le_sum
    intro v hv
    let deg (k : Fin 2) := ((Finset.univ : Finset V).filter (fun u ↦ u ≠ v ∧ c (Sym2.mk (v, u)) = k)).card
    have h_deg : deg 0 + deg 1 = 5 := by
      rw [← Finset.card_univ, ← Finset.card_erase_of_mem hv, Finset.card_filter_union_filter_neg_eq_card]
      simp [deg, Fin.forall_fin_two]
    rw [Nat.choose_le_choose_add_choose h_deg]
    norm_num

  -- Main proof
  rw [← h_triangle_partition, schur_6_sub1, schur_6_sub2] at h_total_triangles_val
  linarith
